itinerary.title: Arrival in Bangkok and Asiatique Night Market
itinerary.description: Arrive at Suvarnabhumi Airport in Bangkok, where you will be met by our representative and transferred to your hotel for check-in. In the evening, explore the vibrant Asiatique Riverfront Night Market, and enjoy a welcome dinner featuring traditional Thai cuisine.

itinerary.title: Bangkok City Temple Tour and River Cruise
itinerary.description: Discover the heritage of Bangkok with a visit to the grand Grand Palace and the Temple of the Emerald Buddha (Wat Phra Kaew). Explore the Wat Pho temple, housing the famous Reclining Buddha. After lunch at a local restaurant, enjoy a boat ride along the Chao Phraya River, followed by shopping time at MBK Center or Siam Paragon.

itinerary.title: Bangkok to Pattaya and Sanctuary of Truth
itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out of your hotel and drive to the coastal town of Pattaya (approximately two hours). Visit the Sanctuary of Truth, a magnificent hand-carved wooden temple. Spend the afternoon relaxing at Pattaya Beach, with options to explore the nightlife or attend a cabaret show in the evening.

itinerary.title: Coral Island (Koh Larn) Boat Excursion
itinerary.description: Embark on a full-day excursion to Coral Island (Koh Larn) by boat. Spend your day swimming, sunbathing, or participating in water sports like snorkeling. Enjoy a freshly prepared lunch on the beach before returning to Pattaya for your overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Pattaya to Bangkok Airport Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast at your hotel and check out. Enjoy a comfortable private transfer back to Bangkok's airport for your return flight home.

title: Thailand Explorer
description: Explore the vibrant culture, stunning beaches, and bustling markets of Thailand on this exciting 5-day tour. Perfect for travelers seeking a mix of adventure, coastal relaxation, and temple excursions - all within a curated, premium package.
highlights: Explore the historic Grand Palace and Wat Phra Kaew in Bangkok
Boat cruise along the Chao Phraya River and local shopping
Visit the Sanctuary of Truth wooden temple in Pattaya
Full-day speedboat excursion to Coral Island (Koh Larn)
